## MOMCLAW v${VERSION}

### 🚀 What's New

${CHANGES}

### 📦 Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `MOMCLAW-${VERSION}.apk` | Direct install APK (all devices) |
| `MOMCLAW-${VERSION}.aab` | Android App Bundle (for stores) |

### 📋 System Requirements

- **Android:** 9.0 (API 28) or higher
- **RAM:** 4GB+ recommended
- **Storage:** 3GB+ free for model download

### 🔧 Installation

#### Option 1: Direct APK Install

1. Download `MOMCLAW-${VERSION}.apk`
2. Enable "Install from unknown sources" in Android settings
3. Open the APK file to install
4. Launch MOMCLAW and download the AI model

#### Option 2: Google Play

Coming soon to Google Play Store.

#### Option 3: F-Droid

Coming soon to F-Droid repository.

### 🐛 Known Issues

- First model download requires stable internet connection
- Large models may take time to load on older devices
- See [Issues](https://github.com/serverul/MOMCLAW/issues) for more
